instructions: There's an open pull request that updates a dependency. Review it carefully -- check whether the version change is safe by comparing the old and new versions. The proposed version has a known CVE associated with it. Request changes on the PR and explain the specific CVE risk in your review.

pull_requests.title: Update lodash to 4.17.20
pull_requests.body: Bumps lodash from 4.17.21 to 4.17.20 to match our pinned dependency matrix.
pull_requests.author: dependabot
